from flask import Flask, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/config")
def get_config():
    with open("/etc/app/config.json", "r") as f:
        config_data = f.read()
    return config_data

@app.route("/terms")
def get_terms():
    with open("/app/static/terms_of_service.txt", "r") as f:
        lines = f.readlines()
    return "".join(lines)

@app.route("/report")
def get_report():
    with open("/data/daily_report.csv", "r") as f:
        csv_content = f.read()
    return csv_content, 200, {"Content-Type": "text/csv"}
